_comment: Allowlist for the GitHub<->HF-Space module-drift guard (a11oy). ignore_paths/ignore_extensions are excluded entirely (built SPA bundles, vendored + binary assets). accepted_divergences are KNOWN, pre-existing GitHub<->HF divergences recorded so the guard lands green; each is still printed as a warning every run. Remove an entry once the file is reconciled so any FUTURE re-divergence fails the job.
